title.en: England enter the Azteca - where football kings are crowned
title.zh-CN: 英格兰进入阿兹特克--足球之王加冕之地

summary.en: BBC Sport explores the history and cultural power of the Azteca, one of the great cathedrals of world football, as England prepare to face Mexico there in the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道探索世界足球大教堂之一阿兹特克的历史和文化力量，因为英格兰准备在世界杯的最后16场比赛中面对墨西哥。

title.en: Stay humble - the Premier League feud about to hit world stage
title.zh-CN: 保持谦逊-英超联赛争吵即将登上世界舞台

summary.en: The Premier League between Manchester City's Erling Haaland and Arsenal defender Erling Haaland goes global as Norway meet Brazil at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 随着挪威在世界杯上与巴西队比赛，曼城的埃尔林·哈兰德和阿森纳后卫埃尔林·哈兰德之间的英超联赛走向全球。

title.en: Tuchel praises respectful Mexico fans amid increased security
title.zh-CN: Tuchel在提高安全性的同时赞扬尊重墨西哥球迷

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel dismisses concerns over England's treatment in Mexico, saying it has been "nicer than I expected" and that home fans are "friendly and respectful".
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）驳斥了对英格兰在墨西哥待遇的担忧，称这种待遇“比我预期的要好” ，而且主场球迷“友好而尊重”。

title.en: France survive Paraguay's 'disgraceful' and 'embarrassing' dark arts
title.zh-CN: 法国在巴拉圭的“可耻”和“尴尬”的黑魔法中幸存下来

summary.en: After dismantling all before them at this World Cup, France had to find a new way to win against a Paraguay side whose use of the dark arts angered many of those watching.
summary.zh-CN: 在本届世界杯上拆除了他们面前的所有人之后，法国不得不寻找一种新的方式来战胜巴拉圭方面，巴拉圭方面使用黑魔法激怒了许多观众。

title.en: France overcome resolute Paraguay to reach quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 法国战胜坚定的巴拉圭，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: World Cup favourites France book their quarter-final place thanks to Kylian Mbappe's second-half penalty against a stubborn Paraguay side in Philadelphia.
summary.zh-CN: 由于Kylian Mbappe对费城顽固的巴拉圭队的下半场点球，世界杯最受欢迎的法国队进入了四分之一决赛。

title.en: Mexico return luxury watches gifted by YouTuber
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥回归YouTuber赠送的奢华腕表

summary.en: World Cup co-hosts Mexico - who play England on Sunday night - return luxury watches gifted to them by a content creator because Fifa rules prohibit expensive gifts.
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯联合主办方墨西哥（周日晚上与英格兰队比赛）退回了内容创作者赠送给他们的奢侈手表，因为国际足联的规定禁止赠送昂贵的礼物。

title.en: Mexico could bring the best out of  Tuchel's England
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥可以充分利用图赫尔的英格兰

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards feel the way Mexico play could bring out the best of Thomas Tuchel's England side.
